steps.title: Identify the Key Signal
steps.content: "Follow their ways" is the phrase explaining Andrew's choice. "Ways" refers to behavioral patterns or lifestyle, so "follow" must mean to copy or adopt.

steps.title: Match the Meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "succeed and grow" — the exchange addresses factors that benefit local businesses, and that focus benefits investors. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — thrive: flourish and grow — fits exactly; an exchange focused on local conditions helps businesses succeed. ✓
  • Choice B — disperse: scatter or spread out — implies businesses breaking apart, not prospering. ✗
  • Choice C — ebb: gradually decline — the opposite of what a supportive exchange would produce. ✗
  • Choice D — overspend: spend too much — unrelated to an exchange addressing local business factors. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
